1.title: IncomingBytes Sum
1.query:
timeseries incoming_bytes_sum = avg(cloud.aws.kinesis_data_firehose.incoming_bytes_sum),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(incoming_bytes_sum) desc
| limit 20

2.title: IncomingRecords Sum
2.query:
timeseries incoming_records_sum = avg(cloud.aws.kinesis_data_firehose.incoming_records_sum),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(incoming_records_sum) desc
| limit 20
